task_completion.description: Register the employee_data.csv file as a data source in LibreOffice Writer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Data Sources panel (View -> Data Sources) is open showing 'employee_data' or the 'Exchange Databases' dialog lists the CSV file as an available database.

task_completion.description: Replace the bracketed placeholders with actual mail merge fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document shows merge fields like <FirstName>, <LastName>, <Department> (typically with a gray background) instead of the original plain text brackets like [FIRST_NAME].

task_completion.description: Set up conditional text or hidden paragraphs for the three rating categories and the salary adjustment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Fields' dialog box (Insert -> Field -> More Fields) is open to the 'Functions' tab, showing 'Hidden Paragraph' or 'Conditional Text' being configured with conditions like 'Rating == "Exceeds Expectations"' or 'SalaryAdjustment == "0"'.

task_completion.description: Execute the mail merge to generate the personalized letters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Mail Merge' dialog is visible, or a new document window appears containing the merged letters with actual employee data (e.g., 'Sarah Chen') and multiple pages.

task_completion.description: Save the final merged output as performance_reviews_final.odt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/performance_reviews_final.odt', or the LibreOffice Writer window title bar displaying 'performance_reviews_final.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreOffice Writer GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine interaction with LibreOffice menus, dialogs, and toolbars.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script to generate the ODT file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal does not show Python or shell commands being executed to bypass the GUI and create the final ODT file.

integrity.description: The agent used the mail merge feature rather than manually copy-pasting and editing 15 pages.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of merge fields (<FieldName>) in the template and use of the Mail Merge dialog, rather than manual text editing of 15 separate letters.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV has 15 rows. Placeholders to replace: [FIRST_NAME], [LAST_NAME], [DEPARTMENT], [GOALS_COMPLETED], [GOALS_TARGET], [ATTENDANCE_RATE], [SALARY_ADJUSTMENT], [MANAGER_NAME]. Rating categories: 'Exceeds Expectations' (5 employees, e.g., Sarah Chen), 'Meets Expectations' (7 employees, e.g., Michael Thompson), 'Needs Improvement' (3 employees, e.g., Amara Okafor). Salary adjustment paragraph should be hidden for 5 employees with SalaryAdjustment '0' (Amara Okafor, Daniel Mueller, Yuki Tanaka, Elena Petrova, Aisha Hassan). The final document should have 15 pages, one for each employee.
